editorial_warm.label: 暖色手绘信息图
editorial_warm.description: Hand-drawn editorial infographic. Product launches, adoption paths, how-to.
editorial_warm.global_style: Editorial-infographic style with hand-drawn organic lines, warm palette, conceptual composition. Not a screenshot, not a diagram — an editorial visual.
editorial_warm.prompt_seed: Editorial-infographic: cream base, coral accent, teal structure. Hand-drawn with controlled imperfection.

signal_decoder.label: 信号解读卡
signal_decoder.description: Signal decode cards with layered information hierarchy. External signal analysis.
signal_decoder.global_style: Layered information card style. Multiple signal sources converging into one judgment. Magazine editorial feel with structured callouts.
signal_decoder.prompt_seed: Signal-decoder: light gray base, indigo primary, amber highlight for key judgment. Layered card layout with source attribution.

roi_proof.label: ROI 证明板
roi_proof.description: Revenue/ROI proof with metric cards and evidence chain. Money proof, results.
roi_proof.global_style: Results-proof dashboard with large metric numbers, trend arrows, and evidence chain. Clean business-report aesthetic.
roi_proof.prompt_seed: ROI-proof: white base, green for positive metrics, gold for highlights. Large numbers as hero element, evidence chain below.

case_study.label: 案例拆解
case_study.description: Before/after case study with failure analysis. Pivots, reversals, lessons learned.
case_study.global_style: Case study split layout with clear before/after structure. Red markers for failure, green for recovery. Documentary narrative feel.
case_study.prompt_seed: Case-study: warm gray base, red for before/failure, green for after/recovery. Split layout with evidence cards.

data_dashboard.label: 数据仪表盘
data_dashboard.description: Clean data visualization with charts and comparison grids. Benchmarks, A/B tests.
data_dashboard.global_style: Data dashboard with clean comparison charts, metric cards, and ranking tables. Numbers are the visual. Prioritize readability.
data_dashboard.prompt_seed: Data-dashboard: white base, blue primary, green for positive. Clean chart lines, large metric numbers, comparison grids.

tech_blueprint.label: 科技蓝图
tech_blueprint.description: Technical blueprint with precise geometry. System design, capability delivery, architecture.
tech_blueprint.global_style: Technical blueprint style with precise geometry, grid alignment, and engineering clarity. Dark background with luminous nodes.
tech_blueprint.prompt_seed: Tech-blueprint: dark background, precise lines, neon-accent nodes, engineering diagram clarity. No hand-drawn wobble.

bold_editorial.label: 锐评海报
bold_editorial.description: Typography-driven bold poster. Contrarian takes, strong opinions, provocative angles.
bold_editorial.global_style: Bold editorial poster with oversized Chinese typography as hero element. High contrast, minimal illustration. The judgment IS the visual.
bold_editorial.prompt_seed: Bold-editorial: dark background, oversized Chinese text as hero, amber accent for key judgment. Poster aesthetic, not infographic.

action_playbook.label: 行动手册
action_playbook.description: Action-oriented playbook with clear next-step cards. Signal to action, decision guides.
action_playbook.global_style: Action playbook layout with numbered step cards, priority markers, and clear decision paths. Feels like a field guide, not a report.
action_playbook.prompt_seed: Action-playbook: warm light base, orange for action steps, blue for context. Numbered cards with priority markers. Field guide feel.
